synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21761 Oracle Linux 8 gnome-shell-extensions bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21761
description:
[3.32.1-48]
- Fix workspace-indicator cleanup
  Resolves: RHEL-129131

[3.32.1-47]
- Fix applying num-workspace setting
  Resolves: RHEL-129121
full_text:
